summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Facebook Page Selection UI and Social BYOAK endpoints. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI for Facebook page dropdown selection working correctly when pages_pending=true.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts initialization issue, non-blocking (existing issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: GET /api/social/facebook/pages/{site_id} returns pages list with id and name
Scheduler has daily_job_recovery at 10:30 AM configured
Facebook page dropdown appears when pages_pending=true
Dropdown shows all available pages (Test Page 1, 2, 3)
Page selection saves correctly via API
After selection, modal shows Conectat badge with Test Post button
Test Facebook Post button visible when connected
Test LinkedIn Post button visible (Conectează button when not connected)
seed_data_creation: Created test WordPress site with 3 Facebook pages for testing page selection dropdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Facebook Page Selection UI fully tested. When pages_pending=true and available_pages has items, the dropdown appears in the Social modal. User can select a page and save it via POST /api/social/facebook/select-page/{site_id}?page_id={page_id}. After selection, facebook_connected becomes true and pages_pending becomes false. Scheduler configuration verified: misfire_grace_time=7200 seconds (2 hours), daily_job_recovery runs at 10:30 AM Romania time.
